Infrastructure Intelligence

One vision platform for the physical world.

We survey the block around your property, measure every condition, and track each fix to closure — across streets and properties.

Capture · Understand · Act
Request a sample report → See how the platform works ›

The condition of physical space — a street, a block, a property — is unmeasured and quietly expensive. We make it operable.

The vision platform

Three layers.
One platform.

Everything Tea For Streets does runs on three layers of the same vision platform — capture, understanding, and action.

VE MobileCapture
Field-grade mobile capture turns a phone into a sensor for the physical world — no new hardware, no installs.
Mature
VE OpsUnderstand
The platform scores every condition with confidence; human QA confirms what matters before it moves.
Mature
VE DispatchAct
We route the fix and track every one to done. Building toward physical repair.
Early · live
A guess, or a measurement

The photo sees it. The LiDAR measures it.

Today you get an opinion. We give you a number. Every capture is RGB + LiDAR, fused on one phone — the camera classifies the condition, the depth sensor measures it to the millimeter. Drag to compare the two sensors on the same frame.

RGB 48MP + LiDAR depth ● REC 4K ◖ Photo Depth ◗
graffitiLiDAR · 14.2 ft²
potholeLiDAR · 41 mm · 2.3 L
illegal dumpingLiDAR · 3.2 yd³
⇆
Graffiti
LiDAR measured · 14.2 ft², 2.1 m up the wall
Pothole
LiDAR measured · 41 mm deep, 2.3 L volume
Illegal dumping
LiDAR measured · 3.2 yd³ curbside
◦ Illustrative capture · real pipeline: RGB + depth, fused on-device

Every finding becomes a tracked request — from detection to resolution, with the dates on record. We don't just report the block; we get it fixed. (timeline illustrative)

Resolved to closure · sample block
● StreetScope · live on the App Store

Anyone can report a street issue.

StreetScope is our public app. Snap a pothole, graffiti, or pile of trash, tag it, and submit — and earn street cred for every report. The same vision platform behind SiteScope, now in everyone’s pocket.

01
Snap itPhotograph the issue from the sidewalk — pothole, graffiti, trash, streetlight.
02
Tag itAI-assisted: pick the category and the location is captured automatically.
03
Earn street credEvery report counts toward badges and levels — community service, gamified.
View StreetScope on the App Store →
◦ StreetScope (formerly the Tea For Streets app) is live on the App Store · built with the USC Viterbi Startup Garage.
Street-level intelligence

The record compounds.

Every survey adds to a growing record of conditions, actions, and outcomes. Over time, that history makes prioritization, benchmarking, and resolution tracking more valuable across the environments we serve.

50,000+
images trained our detection models
±9 mm
depth accuracy (RMS) — resolves a 41 mm pothole
48 hr
survey to delivered report
“Over 100 conditions in the quarter-mile — nine within the first hundred steps of the door.”— from our first enterprise capture at a major San Francisco hotel
◦ Figures from TFS captures & the SiteScope Depth Lab. Municipal closures range from under 3 days to over 200 — which is why we track every request to resolution.
What's next · VE Dispatch

The next step isn't detection. It's coordination.

VE Dispatch routes issues to the right person, contractor, or system and tracks resolution from assignment to closure. Long-term, as autonomous repair systems become practical, the same infrastructure can route work to machines as easily as it routes work to people.

Coordination today · autonomy over time
